summary: Foundation iteration smoke test for CareerVerse. Backend health/root/status endpoints verified via curl on public URL. Frontend landing showcase verified with Playwright: navbar, theme toggle + localStorage persistence, all 12 color swatches, 6 button variants, ClassCard/StreamCard/CareerCard/SkillCard examples, 8 showcase sections, FAQ accordion, footer groups, mobile menu, and 404 route. All documentation files (ARCHITECTURE, DATABASE, AUTH, NAVIGATION, PRD) exist.
passed: GET /api/status -> 200 returns list containing qa entry
Navbar: logo 'CareerVerse', theme toggle, 6 'Soon' nav items
Theme toggle adds 'dark' class to html and persists under localStorage key 'careerverse:theme'
All 8 showcase sections render (hero, color-palette, typography, buttons, cards, forms, states, faq)
All 12 color swatches render with correct data-testids
All 6 button variants (primary, secondary, ai, discovery, ghost, destructive)
ClassCard (9,10,12,UG), StreamCard (science/commerce/humanities), CareerCard (DS, UX, Clinical Psych), SkillCard (python)
FAQ accordion item 0 opens on click (aria-expanded=true), items 1 & 2 exist
Footer renders all 4 groups (product, resources, account, company)
Mobile menu toggle reveals navbar-mobile-menu at 390px viewport
Docs exist: ARCHITECTURE.md, DATABASE.md, AUTH.md, NAVIGATION.md, /app/memory/PRD.md
